links.label: shall be established in the top of the mountains
he will teach us of his ways, and we will walk in his paths

name: Swords Into Plowshares
notes: The same oracle of the mountain of the LORD's house, recorded almost verbatim in two prophets. Isaiah opens his vision and Micah closes a section of judgment with it; the three core verses align cleanly though Isaiah says 'all nations' where Micah says 'people' and 'many nations'.
